Name: Kian Das
User Feedback (Rating: 5/5): Incredible speed and low fees. The UI is clean. I wish I could download a summary of the group's expenses. A CSV export feature would be a fantastic addition for professional use cases.

Name: Atharva Rajput
User Feedback (Rating: 5/5): SplitPay is really fast! Settled our apartment bills in seconds. I think adding a direct shareable link for the group would help my roommates join faster without having to copy-paste the long group ID manually.

Name: Advik Das
User Feedback (Rating: 5/5): The UI is very intuitive and modern. I had some trouble explaining to my friend how to join the group. A 'Copy Invite Link' button would solve this completely and make onboarding friction-free.

Name: Aadya Jain
User Feedback (Rating: 5/5): Great concept for cross-border payments! The transaction speed on Stellar is amazing compared to Ethereum. I would give it 5 stars if there was a way to download my payment history for tax purposes. An export feature is a must.

Name: Ishaan Banerjee
User Feedback (Rating: 5/5): Fantastic execution of a real-world problem on the blockchain. I would highly recommend adding a CSV export option so users can keep personal records of their settlements.

Name: Riya Mehta
User Feedback (Rating: 5/5): Very cool use of Soroban smart contracts. The debt simplification algorithm actually works really well. It reduced our 15 transactions to just 3! Would love to see an 'Export to CSV' button next so I can balance my own spreadsheets.

Name: Sneha Nair
User Feedback (Rating: 5/5): Love using native XLM for settlements. Fast and cheap. I run a small startup and we use this for shared expenses. An 'Export to CSV' feature would make accounting so much easier for us.
